title: German Dub anyone
wikitext:
[]: German Dub, anyone?             Quote Post by Mordicaii » Thu Mar 31, 2011 5:54 am I didn't see this in the listings, so I figured I should post it. Has anyone else seen the German dub of Rebuild 1.11 and 2.22? It is really good, if you speak German as a second language (like me), it is a great way to practice, plus, some of the lines just kick major ass when spoken in German.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Thu Mar 31, 2011 6:04 am Does the German Mari also curse? Can I custom splice those curses into Tiffany Grant's performance?

[]:             Quote Post by Mordicaii » Thu Mar 31, 2011 6:12 am Warren Peace wrote: Does the German Mari also curse? Can I custom splice those curses into Tiffany Grant's performance?

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Thu Mar 31, 2011 6:37 am Yeah, I made a thread about the german release a few months ago :> The Dub is really pretty good, imho better than the english dub... especiall Shinjis voice. Spencer has such a strange pitch in hos voice.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Thu Mar 31, 2011 10:02 am Lol. German dub. I saw a clip of Unit 01 awakening in 2.0 with German voices and man,it sucked majorly.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Thu Mar 31, 2011 10:42 am Seele in German, on the other hand... appropriate on SO many levels.

[]:             Quote Post by Mordicaii » Thu Mar 31, 2011 10:48 am Warren Peace wrote: Seele in German, on the other hand... appropriate on SO many levels.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Mar 31, 2011 10:56 am The Rebuild one is not as good as the series one used to be...

[]:             Quote Post by Mordicaii » Thu Mar 31, 2011 11:39 am Kendrix wrote: The Rebuild one is not as good as the series one used to be...

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Mar 31, 2011 12:01 pm Mordicaii wrote: I been have trying to find the German series dub for quite a while. It was very difficult to find a torrent of Rebuild 1.11 and 2.22. Since I have not seen it, I can't really comment, from what I've seen on Youtube, it sounds excellent, though.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Mar 31, 2011 12:58 pm I don't speak German, but I've heard the German dub of Evangelion is one of the better ones, along with the Japanese and English versions. The Italian one looks pretty good too, though that's another topic.

[]:             Quote Post by Kevin » Thu Mar 31, 2011 1:16 pm Eva 04 wrote: Lol. German dub. I saw a clip of Unit 01 awakening in 2.0 with German voices and man,it sucked majorly.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Mar 31, 2011 1:20 pm Guys let's not start this please thank you.

[]:             Quote Post by Kevin » Thu Mar 31, 2011 1:25 pm I don't wanna start anything, I just hate it, that every topic (No matter what it is about, no matter in which forum) that compares something has at least one flame already on the first page.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Mar 31, 2011 1:28 pm gatotsu911 wrote: I don't speak German, but I've heard the German dub of Evangelion is one of the better ones, along with the Japanese and English versions. The Italian one looks pretty good too, though that's another topic.

[]:             Quote Post by Kevin » Thu Mar 31, 2011 1:32 pm The german rebuild dub did a good job, they even kept the jap. screaming and mixed it well with the german voice.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Mar 31, 2011 1:42 pm Kendrix wrote: I've only seen bits and pieces of the english one but I got the impression that it was a bit over the top at times - most of it was fine, tough, except for Asuka's squeaking, ear drum frying voice actress.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Mar 31, 2011 3:10 pm gatotsu911 wrote: @Kendrix: They kept the Japanese screaming in the dub? That just seems lazy. And potentially jarring.

[]:             Quote Post by Kevin » Thu Mar 31, 2011 3:44 pm gatotsu911 wrote: @Kendrix: They kept the Japanese screaming in the dub? That just seems lazy. And potentially jarring.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu Mar 31, 2011 6:39 pm Kendrix wrote: The Rebuild one is not as good as the series one used to be...
summary:
[]: German Dub, anyone?             Quote Post by Mordicaii » Thu Mar 31, 2011 5:54 am I didn't see this in the listings, so I figured I should post it. Has anyone else seen the German dub of Rebuild 1.11 and 2.22? It is really good, if you speak German as a second language (like me), it is a great way to practice, plus, some of the lines just kick major ass when spoken in German.
